entities.name: INTEGRATED SOIL FERTILITY MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A system-wide technology consisting of a set of soil fertility management practices combined with knowledge of local conditions

entities.name: FARMING SYSTEM PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The overall effectiveness and output of a farming system

entities.name: INDUSTRIAL FERTILIZER
entities.description: Chemical fertilizers used as part of soil fertility management

entities.name: ORGANIC INPUTS
entities.description: Natural materials used to improve soil fertility

entities.name: IMPROVED CROP VARIETIES
entities.description: Crop versions developed for better performance and yield

entities.name: LOCAL CONDITIONS
entities.description: The specific environmental and site-specific factors of a farm

entities.name: AGRONOMIC EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which crops utilize inputs

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of input

entities.name: RISK
entities.description: The potential for loss or failure in farming operations

entities.name: POST-HARVEST LOSSES
entities.description: The amount of crop lost between harvest and consumption
